name: Pinnate
description: Rows of leaflet triangles alternating up the stem, re-shading frond by frond on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(0 50%, 100% 0, 100% 100%); clip-path: polygon(0 50%, 100% 0, 100% 100%); } @match(@y % 2 == 0) { -webkit-clip-path: polygon(100% 50%, 0 0, 0 100%); clip-path: polygon(100% 50%, 0 0, 0 100%); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
